CustomField.description: This field determines the frequency of the schedule. By default, it is set to 12, meaning a yearly escalation schedule will be generated. If no value is provided, only a single schedule will be created when using the 'Generate Schedule' button.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This field determines the frequency of the schedule. By default, it is set to 12, meaning a yearly escalation schedule will be generated. If no value is provided, only a single schedule will be created when using the 'Generate Schedule' button.
CustomField.label: Escalation Period (Months)
